heroDescription: From emergency repairs to full bathroom renovations, Bradshaw Plumbing delivers professional, reliable service backed by over 35 years of experience. 24/7 emergency plumbing — fully licensed, certified, and insured.
footerDescription: Scarborough & GTA's trusted plumbing and renovation experts. Fully licensed, WSIB covered, and available around the clock for over 35 years.

primary.title: Residential Plumbing Service
primary.description: Tap installations, toilet maintenance, pipe repairs, and complete remodelling projects — done right the first time.
primary.imageAlt: Residential plumbing repair and installation service

primary.title: Bathroom Renovations
primary.description: From design consultation to final installation — showers, vanities, tubs, and fixtures from top brands in our showroom.
primary.imageAlt: Complete bathroom renovation and design services

primary.title: 24/7 Emergency Plumbing
primary.description: Burst pipes, flooding, or sewer backup? Our radio-dispatched trucks are stocked and ready to respond any hour, any day.

reviews.name: Diana S.
reviews.text: Had to get 2 faucet cartridges and faucets replaced and flusher handle on toilet. Anson our serviceman was awesome — very efficient and explained everything in detail.

reviews.name: Rob N.
reviews.text: Quick and excellent service, had exactly what I needed. Thanks Bradshaw!

reviews.name: Ahmad
reviews.text: Spoke to a gentleman over the phone regarding plumbing work. They sound like reliable, honest and good people. I would recommend them.

reviews.name: Ray A.
reviews.text: Great place and very helpful. They were able to provide the right piece that I needed. And even gave me helpful tips to ensure it didn't leak. I will come back here again.

reviews.name: Elsa T.
reviews.text: My taps had been leaking for a long time and were totally corroded. I wondered how they would ever get them removed. The plumber Todd arrived — courteous, efficient, and got the job done with no mess left behind!

reviews.name: Nick M.
reviews.text: I have gone to their store front on several occasions to get products and advice on do-it-myself repairs. The staff has always been really helpful and more than willing to give me pointers. Thanks!

guarantees.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
guarantees.description: Plumbing emergencies don't wait. Our team is ready any hour, any day — radio dispatched for fast response.

guarantees.title: Free Estimates
guarantees.description: Get a no-obligation quote for all plumbing, bathroom fixtures, and renovation needs before work begins.

guarantees.title: 25+ Years Experience
guarantees.description: Scarborough & GTA's trusted plumbing experts since 1989. Fully qualified, certified, and insured technicians.

guarantees.title: Bathroom Showroom
guarantees.description: Visit our retail showroom at 12 Old Kingston Road for fixtures, vanities, and design consultations.

promotion.headline: Ready for a Bathroom Upgrade?
promotion.description: Book a free design consultation and receive an immediate credit toward your bathroom renovation project. Visit our showroom or call today.
promotion.label: New Customer Special
